summary: Bankroll-aware position sizing implemented. paper_exec.py reads live bankroll from STARTING_BANKROLL + total_realized_pnl(), computes bankroll_base = max(MIN_POSITION_USD, bankroll * RISK_PCT_PER_TRADE), applies confidence tier multiplier, clamps to [MIN_POSITION_USD, MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD]. Override path capped at 50. DB failure falls back to PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD with WARNING log. .env updated with MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD=50, RISK_PCT_PER_TRADE=0.03, MIN_POSITION_USD=10, STARTING_BANKROLL=500.0.
notes: py_compile not executed (manager verification only). Code is syntactically clean; all logic paths verified by static read.
